requirement: The system shall generate useful unit tests and monitors to improve code coverage and quality.

requirement: The system shall provide accurate code explanations to help users understand new codebases.

requirement: The system shall provide contextual help, examples, and suggestions that reduce the need for context switching to browser searches.
exact_text_quote: Similarly, it provides useful contextual help, examples and suggestions, which in turn boosts productivity by reducing the need for context switching to browser searches.

requirement: The system shall support debugging compiler and linter errors by providing targeted and useful suggestions when the problem is clearly described.
exact_text_quote: In terms of debugging compiler and linter errors, GitHub Copilot proves beneficial, especially when the problem is clearly described, leading to more targeted and useful suggestions.

requirement: The system shall simplify code review by clearly explaining changes made to the code.
exact_text_quote: Moreover, it simplifies the code review process by clearly explaining changes made to the code, thereby aiding reviewers and promoting a more standardized code quality over time.

requirement: The system shall support code generation and updates using relevant files with similar patterns as context.
exact_text_quote: We noted that the quality of the generated code improves significantly when context is provided through relevant files with similar patterns, and the use of descriptive function and variable names enhances the generated code’s relevance and quality.

requirement: The system shall support detailed prompting to optimize the functionality of generated code.
exact_text_quote: We recommend maintaining high-quality existing code, using descriptive naming, and providing detailed prompts to optimize the functionality of GitHub Copilot.

requirement: The system shall produce code whose quality improves when the surrounding codebase is high quality.
exact_text_quote: Moreover, the quality of generated code can vary depending on the existing codebase.

requirement: The system shall generate code that is relevant and of higher quality when descriptive function and variable names are used.
exact_text_quote: We noted that the quality of the generated code improves significantly when context is provided through relevant files with similar patterns, and the use of descriptive function and variable names enhances the generated code’s relevance and quality.

requirement: The system shall be reviewed carefully before generated code is accepted.
exact_text_quote: Code quality could be variable, detailed prompting often helped, and a thorough review was always needed before accepting generated code.

requirement: The system shall be used with careful attention to subtle errors such as missing error checks, unoptimized code, and insecure code.
exact_text_quote: More subtle errors such as missing error checks, unoptimized code or insecure code require more careful attention, and familiarity with the programming language and the domain.

requirement: The system shall provide explicit alternative code recommendations to support users in exploring alternative paths in a data science workflow.
exact_text_quote: an AI-based coding assistant that provides explicit alternatives as recommendations throughout the data science workflow.

requirement: The system shall generate helpful (alternative) code recommendations for the subsequent next step in a data science workflow.
exact_text_quote: whether an AI assistant can generate helpful recommendations, including alternative recommendations, for the subsequent next step in a data science workflow

requirement: The system shall allow users to specify the data science workflow step information in the prompt when requesting code recommendations.
exact_text_quote: allowing the user to add data science workflow information

requirement: The system shall support cell-based interaction within computational notebooks for requesting the next step recommendation for a code cell.
exact_text_quote: supports cell-based interaction as cells are the logical unit of computation in Jupyter.

requirement: The system shall provide interface elements that are cell-based and model-agnostic for integrating coding assistance in computational notebooks.
exact_text_quote: a Jupyter plugin that integrates AI assistants in the computational notebook and provides interface elements that are cell-based and model-agnostic.

requirement: The system shall allow users to request a new recommendation for a code cell and optionally request its alternatives.
exact_text_quote: requests *a new recommendation* for the prompt input and *explicitly* requests its *alternatives*

requirement: The system shall request the AI assistant to return a response along with three alternatives when configured for recommendations with alternatives.
exact_text_quote: requests the AI assistant to return a response along with three alternatives.

requirement: The system shall present code recommendations to the user in a side-panel space that mimics a code cell.
exact_text_quote: For presenting code recommendations to the user, *CATSci* uses the side-panel space that mimics a code cell to show the recommended code.

requirement: The system shall process the model API response and present it based on the prompt type.
exact_text_quote: *CATSci* processes the response from the model’s API and presents it based on the prompt type.

requirement: The system shall guide the AI assistant response to follow a consistent format using a pre-defined prompt template.
exact_text_quote: Through the pre-defined prompt template, we guide GPT’s response to follow a consistent format in order to process the response.

requirement: The system shall allow users to accept, reject, edit, and save code recommendations for later use.
exact_text_quote: The user can interact with the code recommendation using the following actions: *accept* the recommendation, *reject* the recommendation, *edit* the recommendation, and *save* the recommendation for later use.

requirement: The system shall allow users to insert an accepted recommendation into the notebook cell via a button click.
exact_text_quote: they can insert it into the cell with a click of a button

requirement: The system shall allow users to provide feedback on recommendations through likes, dislikes, or a text comment.
exact_text_quote: Additionally, the user can provide feedback on the recommendation through likes, dislikes, or a text comment.

requirement: The system shall allow users to customize prompting by including previous cells as context for the next code recommendation.
exact_text_quote: previous cells (including code and markdown cells) that are considered to provide context for the next code recommendation

requirement: The system shall allow users to add additional natural language instructions to the prompt.
exact_text_quote: additional instructions: users can add natural language text to provide more instructions to the assistant.

requirement: The system shall be implemented in a non-intrusive way that does not interfere with users’ original notebook.
exact_text_quote: It is implemented in a non-intrusive way, that is, not interfering with the users’ original notebook

requirement: The system shall allow interaction with the AI assistant through a side panel.
exact_text_quote: allowing interaction with the AI assistant through a side panel

requirement: The system shall autonomously perform data querying, processing, and visualization tailored to diverse human requests.
exact_text_quote: we propose Data-Copilot, a data analysis agent that autonomously performs data querying, processing, and visualization tailored to diverse human requests.

requirement: The system shall generate code as an intermediary to process massive data and visualize its results for humans.
exact_text_quote: it receives human requests and generates code as an intermediary to process massive data and visualize its results (e.g., chart, table, text) for humans.

requirement: The system shall operate in two phases, including a data exploration phase and a workflow deployment phase.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot is a code-centric agent capable of performing data analysis and visualization based on human instructions. It operates in two phases: Data Exploration and Workflow Deployment.

requirement: The system shall, in the data exploration phase, design a self-exploration process to discover numerous potential needs based on data schemas.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot designs a self-exploration process to discover numerous potential needs based on data schemas (Step 1: exploration).

requirement: The system shall, based on synthesized requests, abstract universal interface modules for subsequent use.
exact_text_quote: Then based on these synthesized requests, it abstracts many universal interface modules (Step 2: design).

requirement: The system shall test and optimize the correctness and universality of each interface in the exploration phase.
exact_text_quote: After that, it optimizes similar interfaces and tests their correctness, ensuring each interface is correct and universal (Step 3: testing and optimization).

requirement: The system shall, when faced with real-time requests, flexibly invoke pre-designed interfaces or directly generate raw code based for the user’s request.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot can flexibly invoke pre-designed interfaces or directly generate raw code based for the user’s request.

requirement: The system shall plan workflow invocation structures that form chain, parallel, or loop structures for interface calls.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot plans workflows—multiple interfaces in specific order forming chain, parallel, or loop structures.

requirement: The system shall output the planned workflow in JSON format.
exact_text_quote: It determines which interfaces to invoke, their sequence, and parameters, outputting in JSON format.

requirement: The system shall support an interface-code hybrid generation strategy for uncovered requests by prioritizing existing interfaces and generating raw code when needed.
exact_text_quote: Specifically, it prioritizes invoking existing interfaces to resolve user requests.

requirement: The system shall generate raw code directly or a combination of raw code and interfaces when the deployed workflow continues to fail or the request cannot be resolved by existing interfaces.
exact_text_quote: if the deployed workflow continues to fail, or if Data-Copilot proactively determines that current request cannot be resolved by existing interfaces, it would generate raw code directly or generate a combination of raw code and interfaces.

requirement: The system shall record uncovered requests in a document and periodically re-initiate the data exploration and interface design stage to update its interface library.
exact_text_quote: After accumulating sufficient new requests, we re-initiated the Data Exploration and interface design stage ([Section 2.1](https://arxiv.org/html/2306.07209v8#S2.SS1 "2.1 Data Exploration ‣ 2 Data-Copilot ‣ Data-Copilot: Bridging Billions of Data and Humans with Autonomous Workflow")), i.e., in real-world interactions, we periodically develop new interfaces for emerging demands, continuously updating Data-Copilot’s interface library.

requirement: The system shall reduce errors during real-time requests by invoking pre-designed and well-validated interfaces rather than generating code from scratch.
exact_text_quote: Compared to generating code from scratch, invoking these pre-designed and well-validated interfaces can significantly reduce errors during real-time requests.

requirement: The system shall improve inference efficiency for real-time requests by invoking pre-designed interfaces rather than generating redundant code.
exact_text_quote: when faced with massive requests, our agent only needs to invoke these pre-designed interfaces rather than generate redundant code, significantly improving inference efficiency.

requirement: The system shall provide interpretability by structuring tasks as interface workflows that are easier for human reading and interaction than lengthy code.
exact_text_quote: these interfaces provide greater interpretability, since it is easier for human reading and interaction.

requirement: The system shall ensure that interface deployment is reliable by designing and validating interfaces in advance.
exact_text_quote: By abstracting common demands into interfaces and validating their functionality in advance, we can significantly improve both the success rate and efficiency of real-time deployment.

requirement: The system shall assist data scientists in automating aspects of their workflow, including data cleaning and preprocessing, model training, and result interpretation.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can assist data scientists in automating various aspects of their workflow, including data cleaning and preprocessing, model training, and result interpretation.

requirement: The system shall support analyzing unstructured data to provide new insights and improve decision-making processes.
exact_text_quote: It also highlights how ChatGPT has the potential to provide new insights and improve decision-making processes by analyzing unstructured data.

requirement: The system shall generate synthetic data for data science tasks.
exact_text_quote: It can be used to create code to automate processes around data gathering, formatting, or cleansing; define data structures; guide us on what infographics should be produced and what information they should entail; create training material; identify data sources required for particular tasks; create synthetic data; give advice on compliance, regulation, and practical steps that can be taken to ensure that data operations are legal, unbiased, and ethical; and help to identify analytical processes leading to best practices [16].

requirement: The system shall help programmers create code to automate processes around data gathering, formatting, or cleansing.
exact_text_quote: It can be used to create code to automate processes around data gathering, formatting, or cleansing;

requirement: The system shall provide explanations and examples of programming concepts such as syntax, data structures, and algorithms.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can be helpful by providing explanations and examples of programming concepts, such as syntax, data structures, algorithms, and more.

requirement: The system shall assist in solving coding challenges and debugging code.
exact_text_quote: Furthermore, ChatGPT can assist in solving coding challenges and debugging code [41].

requirement: The system shall support ethical and integrity-focused use when integrated into data science programs.
exact_text_quote: Integrating ChatGPT training into data science programs can be an effective way to promote these values, provided that the training is conducted in a manner that emphasizes ethics and integrity.

requirement: The system shall provide code completions to a developer within an integrated development environment (IDE).
exact_text_quote: Code-completion systems offering suggestions to a developer in their integrated development environment (IDE) have become the most frequently used kind of programmer assistance.

requirement: The system shall generate code completions using a large language model (LLM) that predicts what the user might type next from the context of the prompt.
exact_text_quote: When generating whole snippets of code, they typically use a large language model (LLM) to predict what the user might type next (the completion) from the context of what they are working on at the moment (the prompt).

requirement: The system shall allow completions at any position in the code, often spanning multiple lines at once.
exact_text_quote: This system allows for completions at any position in the code, often spanning multiple lines at once.

requirement: The system shall define acceptance rate as the fraction of completions shown to the developer that are subsequently accepted for inclusion in the source file.
exact_text_quote: In this work, we define acceptance rate as the fraction of completions shown to the developer that are subsequently accepted for inclusion in the source file.

requirement: The system shall record developer usage events including when a completion is shown and when it is accepted for inclusion in the source file.
exact_text_quote: | `shown` | Completion shown to the developer | | `accepted` | Completion accepted by the developer for inclusion in the source file |

requirement: The system shall support monitoring performance of a neural code synthesis system using acceptance rate as a coarse-grained metric.
exact_text_quote: Our results support the principle that acceptance rate can be used for coarse-grained monitoring of the performance of a neural code synthesis system.

requirement: The system shall provide a mechanism to evaluate suggestion usefulness beyond correctness by measuring whether suggestions are accepted as a starting point for further development.
exact_text_quote: While suggestion correctness is important, the driving factor for these improvements appears to be not correctness as such, but whether the suggestions are useful as a starting point for further development.

requirement: The system shall assist users in writing code by enabling them to describe what they want and then generating the code for them.
exact_text_quote: Then, it writes the code for me.

requirement: The system shall generate boilerplate code tailored to the user’s described task.
exact_text_quote: Both back-end and front-end developers used ChatGPT to create tailored boilerplate code:

requirement: The system shall support refactoring or simplifying existing code.
exact_text_quote: GenAI was used on many different tasks, ranging from refactoring or simplifying code,

requirement: The system shall support translating code from one programming language to another.
exact_text_quote: translating code from one programming language to another,

requirement: The system shall support explaining code to the user.
exact_text_quote: and simply explaining the code.

requirement: The system shall generate tests for code.
exact_text_quote: Testing was also well suited for GenAI utilization; given its repetitive nature, GenAI was used to create numerous tests for the code.

requirement: The system shall provide immediate feedback through a chat interaction to help users get unstuck on complex problems.
exact_text_quote: just by interacting with ChatGPT and getting an immediate response is something else.

requirement: The system shall enable users to keep focus on a task by formulating the problem in the chat.
exact_text_quote: Formulating the problem to ChatGPT made it easier to keep focus on the task,

requirement: The system shall support learning by allowing users to engage interactively with the chat and assign roles to the AI.
exact_text_quote: One approach was to engage interactively with the chat, assigning a role to the AI like “act as a tester,”

requirement: The system shall support learning about testing by letting users ask the AI to explain a topic in a persona-based way.
exact_text_quote: They could then ask that persona to explain a particular topic like they were doing testing for the first time.

requirement: The system shall support domain understanding by using provided context to generate relevant code.
exact_text_quote: This integrated approach to both understanding a domain also then produced the relevant context that ChatGPT could use to generate relevant code.

requirement: The system shall provide output that typically requires further refinement before it can be applied in a real-world context.
exact_text_quote: all informants noted that the content produced by GenAI, regardless of tool, seldom represented a final product and typically required further refinement to be applicable in a real-world context.

requirement: The system shall support integration into the user’s workflow to reduce the need for copy-paste between windows.
exact_text_quote: the general lack of tool integration meant that there was a substantial amount of copy-paste to move text and code between different windows.

requirement: The system shall generate code suggestions for computational notebooks that interleave code and outputs.
exact_text_quote: computational notebooks, such as Jupyter, are of particular interest as they provide rich interface affordances that interleave code and output

requirement: The system shall support a specification-refinement interaction loop in which users specify a programming goal and the system returns code or metadata for subsequent cycles.
exact_text_quote: the user specifies the programming goal using a sequence of gestures, then the system returns code or metadata to the user, which forms the basis for the next cycle of interaction.

requirement: The system shall provide disambiguation by presenting multiple candidate suggestions when the user specification is incomplete or the underlying model is uncertain.
exact_text_quote: Due to incompleteness of the user specification and uncertainty of the underlying model, many systems produce a set of candidate suggestions rather than a single result.

requirement: The system shall support adaptation of generated code by assisting users in an accept-validate-repair sequence.
exact_text_quote: Users often accept these imperfect solutions and then engage in an accept-validate-repair sequence [[4](#Bib0004)] as a way to read, internalize, and adapt the generated code to the local interface.

requirement: The system shall provide mechanisms to help users verify the correctness of generated code, including by enabling exploration of alternative suggestions.
exact_text_quote: A common means of verification explored in our interviews was through the exploration of alternative suggestions (i.e. Code or Effects disambiguation).

requirement: The system shall be designed to respect user agency and workflow while remaining sufficiently visible to encourage adoption.
exact_text_quote: They emphasized that assistants should respect user agency and workflow while remaining sufficiently visible to encourage adoption.

requirement: The system shall balance interface politeness with feature prominence so that controls are discoverable without being intrusive or interrupting.
exact_text_quote: Participants wanted assistants discoverable enough to use but non-intrusive enough to avoid interruption.

requirement: The system shall be adapted for notebook environments rather than relying on purely traditional code-editor interfaces.
exact_text_quote: successful notebook-based code assistants require careful adaptation to this specific computing environment.

requirement: The system shall avoid requiring users to manually specify code context, instead considering available information automatically.
exact_text_quote: They generally preferred not to manually specify context, trusting the system to consider all available information.

requirement: The system shall treat documentation of code generation as unnecessary, preferring to treat generated code as a transparent aid rather than requiring attribution.
exact_text_quote: Most significantly, participants viewed documentation of code generation as unnecessary, preferring to treat generated code like a transparent aid rather than requiring attribution.

requirement: The system shall synergize AI capabilities with human researchers to facilitate hypothesis-free exploratory research and inspire novel scientific insights in large-scale omics.
exact_text_quote: we propose a data-intelligence-intensive bioinformatics copilot (Bio-Copilot) system that synergizes AI capabilities with human researchers to facilitate hypothesis-free exploratory research and inspire novel scientific insights in large-scale omics.

requirement: The system shall decompose a bioinformatics task into modular, hierarchical steps and formulate rules for task allocation and scheduling.
exact_text_quote: Initiated by scientific insights from LLMs, Bio-Copilot decomposes a bioinformatics task into modular, hierarchical steps and then formulates rules for task allocation and scheduling.

requirement: The system shall generate explicit execution plans for the respective steps using planning agent groups, either independently or in collaboration with human researchers.
exact_text_quote: Thereafter, the planning agent groups—either independently or in collaboration with human researchers—generate more explicit execution plans for the respective steps.

requirement: The system shall sequentially accomplish each execution plan by having action execution agent groups gather necessary resources from the environment and execute the plan step-by-step.
exact_text_quote: Finally , according to the generated execution plans, the action execution agent groups gather necessary resources from the environment and sequentially accomplish each execution plan.

requirement: The system shall support code writing, executing, and debugging based on the step-refined plan.
exact_text_quote: (ii) an action execution group carries out code writing, executing, and debugging based on the step-refined plan.

requirement: The system shall provide a user-friendly, highly real-time human–agent interaction mechanism that enables agents to autonomously determine when to engage human researchers.
exact_text_quote: we devised a user-friendly , highly real-time human–agent interaction mechanism to alleviate the misunderstandings of agents on task prompts or context.

requirement: The system shall employ a rule- and prompt-driven approach for human–agent interaction that enables agents to autonomously determine when to engage human researchers.
exact_text_quote: The human–agent interaction mechanism employs a rule- and prompt-driven approach that enables agents to autonomously determine when to engage human researchers, ensuring the efficiency of human guidance.

requirement: The system shall establish a shared knowledge database that encodes expertise from diverse fields into an agent-intelligible format.
exact_text_quote: we established a shared knowledge database which encodes expertise from diverse fields, including various methods and tool documents, into an agent-intelligible format within Bio-Copilot (Fig. S2a).

requirement: The system shall dynamically retrieve relevant information from the knowledge base to formulate rational plans and generate code tailored to task-specific requirements.
exact_text_quote: By dynamically retrieving relevant information from the knowledge base, agents formulate rational plans and generate code tailored to task-specific requirements

requirement: The system shall support continuous learning strategies where agents engage in self-reflective learning from their own behaviors and other agents’ behaviors to progressively refine their decision-making and execution capabilities over time.
exact_text_quote: agents engage in both self-reflective learning [35] from their own behaviors and other agents’ behaviors, progressively refining their decision-making and execution capabilities over time.

requirement: The system shall mitigate hallucinations and biases inherent in LLMs during reasoning and decision-making by using the knowledge base and dynamic retrieval.
exact_text_quote: thereby mitigating the hallucinations and biases inherent in LLMs during reasoning and decision-making ( Fig. S2b).

requirement: The system shall reduce sensitivity to prompt variations to improve operational stability through agent group and reflection mechanisms.
exact_text_quote: The agent group and reflection mechanisms reduce sensitivity to prompt variations, improving operational stability .

requirement: The system shall ensure that code quality includes accuracy, efficiency, completeness, readability, logicality, portability, maintainability, usability, reusability, robustness, security, and scalability.
exact_text_quote: including accuracy, efficiency, completeness, readability, logicality, portability, maintainability, usability, reusability, robustness, security, and scalability.

requirement: The system shall interpret natural language requests to provide contextually relevant assistance within users' productivity workflows.
exact_text_quote: The system interprets natural language requests, accessing organizational knowledge to provide contextually relevant assistance.

requirement: The system shall enable users to select appropriate pre-built cognitive models, customize parameters, and integrate results into existing systems.
exact_text_quote: users select appropriate models, customize parameters, and integrate results into existing systems.

requirement: The system shall allow business professionals to construct applications through visual interfaces.
exact_text_quote: Business professionals construct applications through visual interfaces, encoding domain expertise directly into functional tools.

requirement: The system shall provide algorithmic fairness by allowing users to analyze AI reasoning processes.
exact_text_quote: Algorithmic fairness allows users to analyze AI reasoning processes.

requirement: The system shall enforce privacy controls to ensure sensitive data remains protected throughout processing chains.
exact_text_quote: Privacy controls ensure sensitive data remains protected throughout processing chains.

requirement: The system shall support interoperability by enabling data flows between services without format conversions or manual transfers.
exact_text_quote: Data flows between services without format conversions or manual transfers.

requirement: The system shall surface AI insights within familiar interfaces such as spreadsheets, documents, and meetings.
exact_text_quote: AI insights surface within familiar interfaces —Excel spreadsheets display predictive analytics, Word documents incorporate automated summaries, and Teams meetings feature real -time transcription.

requirement: The system shall evolve based on user feedback by influencing feature prioritization through regular updates.
exact_text_quote: User feedback directly influences feature prioritization.

requirement: The system shall fit tools to existing practices rather than forcing practices to fit tools.
exact_text_quote: recognition that successful technology adoption depends on fitting tools to existing practices, not forcing practices to fit tools.

requirement: The system shall provide safeguards that prevent discriminatory outcomes.
exact_text_quote: built-in safeguards prevent discriminatory outcomes

requirement: The system shall explain AI decisions in terms humans understand.
exact_text_quote: explain AI decisions in terms humans understand.

requirement: The system shall support scientific reproducibility by requiring careful documentation of algorithmic processes.
exact_text_quote: Scientific reproducibility demands careful documentation of algorithmic processes.

requirement: The system shall decompose a data analysis task into three editable phases consisting of input/output assumptions, an execution plan, and code and output.
exact_text_quote: the Phasewise system decomposes the problem into three editable, logical phases: structured input/output assumptions, execution plan, and code.

requirement: The system shall decompose a data analysis task into step-by-step subgoals with editable assumptions and corresponding code at each step until the task is complete.
exact_text_quote: the Stepwise system decomposes the task into separate steps (visually similar to a computational notebook), displaying editable assumptions and their corresponding code one step at a time until the task is complete.

requirement: The system shall allow users to directly edit and update assumptions and their corresponding actions (code) to steer the AI's output.
exact_text_quote: DG.1 *proposes visually separating each different assumption from its corresponding actions (code) and allowing users to directly edit and update them.*

requirement: The system shall generate and render the AI's chain-of-thought reasoning as structured, editable UI components that users can modify at any time.
exact_text_quote: the need for new affordances that decompose and display the AI's chain-of-thought reasoning as structured and interactive assumptions, enabling users to modify them at any time, even retroactively.

requirement: The system shall generate a list of natural language execution plan steps based on the (edited) assumptions and allow users to add or remove steps.
exact_text_quote: Steps are editable and the user may add or remove steps.

requirement: The system shall execute the AI-generated code immediately and display it in an editor to allow modification and re-execution.
exact_text_quote: The code is immediately executed and displayed in an editor to allow modification and re-execution

requirement: The system shall display variables and dataframes created during code execution as intermediary variables that users may inspect.
exact_text_quote: Any variables and dataframes created during execution are displayed as intermediary variables that the user may inspect.

requirement: The system shall provide a side conversation feature that allows users to ask natural language questions about generated code and receive AI responses in a side panel.
exact_text_quote: *Ask Question:* This allows users to ask questions about the generated code

requirement: The system shall provide a side conversation feature that enables ancillary data analysis tasks using natural language queries by generating and executing code in a side panel.
exact_text_quote: *Run Side Query:* This feature enables ancillary data analysis tasks using natural language queries.

requirement: The system shall allow users to select code in the editor and use it to generate code based on a natural language query.
exact_text_quote: *Generate Code:* This feature generates code based on the selected code segment and the user's query.

requirement: The system shall support undoing pending edits using an undo button.

exact_text_quote: This includes designing systems that can detect uncertainty, surface potential issues, and escalate to human input when appropriate.

requirement: The system shall integrate human-in-the-loop methodologies into the training, validation, and deployment phases of AI tools.
exact_text_quote: In particular, digital health companies should integrate human-in-the-loop (HITL) methodologies, an approach that embeds human judgment into the training, validation, and deployment phases of AI tools.

requirement: The system shall provide real-time oversight within system workflows.
exact_text_quote: HITL is distinct from broader governance or post-hoc audits in that it provides direct, real-time oversight within system workflows.

requirement: The system shall deploy automated, self-check monitoring systems to continuously track both traditional KPIs and user experience metrics.
exact_text_quote: Deploy automated, self-check monitoring systems to continuously track both traditional KPIs (eg, accuracy, response times, and error rates) and user experience metrics (eg, task completion rates, interaction frequency, and perceived usability).

requirement: The system shall analyze incoming data to systematically identify patterns or recurring issues that may impact performance or user engagement.
exact_text_quote: Analyze incoming data to systematically identify patterns or recurring issues that may impact the AI’s performance or user engagement.

requirement: The system shall implement strategic refinements based on monitored insights to address significant challenges or adapt to evolving user needs and company priorities.
exact_text_quote: Implement strategic refinements based on monitored insights to address significant challenges or adapt the AI system to evolving user needs and company priorities.

requirement: The system shall conduct regular audits to assess technical metrics alongside user experience metrics.
exact_text_quote: Conduct regular audits to assess technical metrics, such as accuracy and reliability, alongside user experience metrics, including satisfaction and usability.

requirement: The system shall incorporate usability testing as a continuous process to regularly identify pain points and opportunities for improvement among diverse user groups.
exact_text_quote: Incorporate usability testing as a continuous process to regularly identify pain points and opportunities for improvement among diverse user groups.

requirement: The system shall prioritize publishing and reporting on AI performance, user experiences, and trust-building metrics throughout AI integration.
exact_text_quote: Prioritize publishing and reporting on AI performance, user experiences, and trust-building metrics throughout AI integration (ie, from beta testing to post-launch).

requirement: The system shall ensure continuous, scientifically grounded evaluation is embedded into workflows to ensure trust, scalability, and measurable impact.
exact_text_quote: Scientific evaluation is not just a checkpoint—it is an operational layer that should be embedded into workflows to ensure trust, scalability, and measurable impact.

requirement: The system shall support collaborative agent workflows that integrate AI models and scientific tools with experimental platforms.
exact_text_quote: collaborative agents that integrate AI models and biomedical tools with experimental platforms.

requirement: The system shall enable agents to analyze large datasets and navigate hypothesis spaces.
exact_text_quote: AI’s ability to analyze large datasets, navigate hypothesis spaces

requirement: The system shall support planning discovery workflows and performing self-assessment to identify and mitigate gaps in knowledge.
exact_text_quote: planning discovery workﬂows and performing self-assessment to identify and mitigate gaps in their knowledge.

requirement: The system shall use large language models and generative models to feature structured memory for continual learning.
exact_text_quote: These agents use large language models and generative models to feature structured memory for continual learning

requirement: The system shall allow agents to formulate hypotheses, critically evaluate them, characterize uncertainty, and use that uncertainty to acquire and refine scientific knowledge bases.
exact_text_quote: An AI agent should be able to formulate biomedical hypotheses, critically evaluate them, characterize their uncertainty, and use that as a driver to acquire and reﬁne its scientiﬁc knowledge bases in a way that human scientists can trust.

requirement: The system shall enable agents to adapt to new insights, incorporate latest findings, and refine hypotheses based on experimental results.
exact_text_quote: AI agents should be designed to adapt to new biological insights, incorporate the latest scientiﬁc ﬁndings, and reﬁne hypotheses based on experimental results.

requirement: The system shall provide conversational interfaces that emulate human expertise and can access tools.
exact_text_quote: Programming a single LLM with diverse roles equips LLM-based agents with conversational interfaces that emulate human expertise and can access tools

requirement: The system shall support multi-agent systems that combine heterogeneous agents, including machine learning tools, domain-specific specialized tools, and human experts.
exact_text_quote: we envision multi-agent systems for discovery workﬂows that combine heterogeneous agents ( Figure 1 ) consisting of ML tools, domain-speciﬁc specialized tools, and human experts.

requirement: The system shall support a self-driving laboratory workflow that iteratively optimizes an end-to-end discovery workflow under broad direction of scientists without requiring step-by-step human oversight.
exact_text_quote: The self-driving laboratory ( Figure 3 F) is a multi-agent system where the end-to-end discovery workﬂow is iteratively optimized under the broad direction of scientists but without requiring step-by-step human oversight.

requirement: The system shall enable agents to describe experiments necessary to test generated hypotheses, analyze experimental results, and use them to improve internal scientific knowledge models.
exact_text_quote: it can describe experiments necessary to test the generated hypotheses, analyze the results of said experiments, and use them to improve its internal scientiﬁc knowledge models.

requirement: The system shall include perception modules that interpret and assimilate information from various data modalities.
exact_text_quote: Perception modules enable the agent to interpret and assimilate information from various data modalities.

requirement: The system shall include interaction modules that allow agents to communicate and collaborate with scientists, other AI agents, and tools.
exact_text_quote: Chat-optimized LLM-based agents thus need interaction capabilities to communicate and collaborate with scientists, other AI agents, and tools to function beyond a simple chatbot.

requirement: The system shall provide tool-use capabilities so agents can access machine learning tools and experimental platforms.
exact_text_quote: These include agent-human interaction to support communication with scientists and following human instruction, multi-agent interaction for collaboration among agents, and tool-use action to access ML tools and experimental platforms.

requirement: The system shall provide memory modules that store and recall information to alleviate the need for manual log recording.
exact_text_quote: memory modules alleviate the need for manual log recording by memorizing necessary experimental outputs.

requirement: The system shall support reasoning modules that improve agents’ capabilities to plan experiments, make decisions on hypotheses, and resolve competing mechanisms.
exact_text_quote: Reasoning improves agents’ capabilities to plan experiments, make decisions on biological hypotheses, and resolve competing candidate biological mechanisms.

requirement: The system shall support self-assessment and uncertainty characterization to enable human trust in agent outputs.
exact_text_quote: in a way that human scientists can trust.

requirement: The system shall be robust and reliable enough to mitigate unreliable predictions such as hallucinations, reasoning errors, systematic biases, and planning failures when connected with tools and experimental platforms.
exact_text_quote: is their propensity for generating unreliable predictions, including the hallucination of non-factual information, reasoning errors, systematic biases, and failures in planning when connected with tools and experimental platforms.

requirement: The system shall verify agent action plans before execution to avoid stalling and repeated attempts in embodied settings.
exact_text_quote: Hence, it is necessary to verify the agent action plan before execution.

requirement: The system shall provide evaluation protocols that assess agent performance beyond accuracy, including practical implications such as ethical considerations and regulatory compliance.
exact_text_quote: Evaluating AI agents requires an analysis of their theoretical capabilities and an assessment of practical implications, including ethical considerations, regulatory compliance, and the ability to integrate into discovery workﬂows.

requirement: The system shall support governance and responsible human-AI partnership to unlock the transformative potential of AI agents in biomedical research.
exact_text_quote: By fostering responsible human-AI partnerships and establishing robust governance frameworks, we can unlock the transformative potential of AI agents in biomedical research.

requirement: The system shall support an AI principal investigator that takes a scientific challenge from a human researcher and drives the project forward.
exact_text_quote: The human researcher gives the AI principal investigator, or AI PI, a scientific challenge, and the AI PI takes it from there.

requirement: The system shall determine what other agents and expertise are needed to tackle a given project.
exact_text_quote: It’s the AI PI’s job to figure out the other agents and expertise needed to tackle the project,

requirement: The system shall include a critic agent in every project that provides constructive criticism to other agents.
exact_text_quote: And, in every project, no matter the topic, there’s one agent that assumes the role of critic. Its job is to poke holes, caution against common pitfalls and provide constructive criticism to other agents.

requirement: The system shall equip its agents with tools and software systems to support scientific work.
exact_text_quote: Zou and his team equipped the virtual scientists with tools and software systems, such as the protein modeling AI system AlphaFold, to better stimulate creative “thinking” skills.

requirement: The system shall allow agents to request access to certain tools and use them when access is built into the model.
exact_text_quote: “They would ask for access to certain tools, and we’d build it into the model to let them use it,” Zou said.

requirement: The system shall run regular meetings in which agents generate ideas and engage in conversational back-and-forth.
exact_text_quote: Just like Zou’s research group, the virtual lab has regular meetings during which agents generate ideas and engage in a conversational back-and-forth.

requirement: The system shall support one-on-one meetings that allow lab members to meet with the PI agent individually to discuss ideas.
exact_text_quote: They also have one-on-one meetings, allowing lab members to meet with the PI agent individually to discuss ideas.

requirement: The system shall conduct virtual meetings quickly, taking only a few seconds or minutes.
exact_text_quote: But unlike human meetings, these virtual gatherings take a few seconds or minutes.

requirement: The system shall allow multiple meetings to run in parallel.
exact_text_quote: so multiple meetings run in parallel.

requirement: The system shall operate with minimal human micromanagement, with human intervention about 1% of the time.
exact_text_quote: Not one prone to micromanagement — in the real or virtual world — Zou estimates that he or his lab members intervene about 1% of the time.

requirement: The system shall capture each meeting, exchange, and interaction via a transcript so human researchers can track progress and redirect the project if needed.
exact_text_quote: each meeting, exchange and interaction in the virtual lab is captured via a transcript, allowing human researchers to track progress and redirect the project if needed.

requirement: The system shall support agents that act as sophisticated data analysts that can reassess previously published papers.
exact_text_quote: they’ve recently developed agents that act as sophisticated data analysts that can reassess previously published papers.

requirement: The system shall enable AI agents to come up with new findings beyond what previous human researchers published on.
exact_text_quote: Often the AI agents are able to come up with new findings beyond what the previous human researchers published on.

requirement: The system shall take a baseline paper from a human mentor and analyze its limitations.
exact_text_quote: Given the baseline paper from the human mentor, it analyzes its limitations,

requirement: The system shall formulate novel hypotheses for improving the baseline paper.
exact_text_quote: formulates novel hypotheses for improvement,

requirement: The system shall validate the formulated hypotheses through rigorous experimentation.
exact_text_quote: validates them through rigorous experimentation,

requirement: The system shall write a paper with the results of the validated hypotheses.
exact_text_quote: and writes a paper with the results.

requirement: The system shall leverage modern coding agents to handle complex, multi-file implementations.
exact_text_quote: leverages modern coding agents to handle complex, multi-file implementations,

requirement: The system shall provide the baseline paper, its LaTeX source files, and the associated codebase for each stage.
exact_text_quote: We provide the baseline paper, its LaTeX source files, and the associated codebase for each stage.

requirement: The system shall automatically generate ideas based on the limitations of a given paper.
exact_text_quote: (1) automatic idea generation based on the limitations of a given paper,

requirement: The system shall automatically implement and thoroughly validate the proposed ideas.
exact_text_quote: (2) automatic implementation and thorough validation of the proposed ideas,

requirement: The system shall automatically write a research paper based on the obtained results.
exact_text_quote: (3) automatic writing of a research paper based on the obtained results.

requirement: The system shall translate research ideas into concrete implementations using a coding agent.
exact_text_quote: A powerful coding agent (e.g. Claude Code (Anthropic, 2025)) is employed to translate research ideas into concrete implementations.

requirement: The system shall execute the specified command after the coding agent generates a runnable file.
exact_text_quote: After the agent generates a runnable file (e.g. proposed_method.py in Stage1), our system mechanically executes the specified command.

requirement: The system shall allow the coding agent to read and write any files within the working directory.
exact_text_quote: The coding agent is allowed to read and write any files within the working directory.

requirement: The system shall manage experiments in three stages: idea implementation, iterative improvement, and ablation study.
exact_text_quote: It is divided into three stages: Stage 1: Idea Implemention, Stage 2: Iterative Improvement, and Stage 3: Ablation Study.

requirement: The system shall iteratively improve the method until its performance metrics surpass those of the baseline.
exact_text_quote: Stage 2 ends when a bug-free implementation surpasses the baseline performance.

requirement: The system shall perform ablation studies by generating ablation study ideas with an LLM and implementing corresponding scripts with the coding agent.
exact_text_quote: In each trial, the system uses an LLM to generate ablation study ideas and then employs the coding agent to implement corresponding scripts based on those ideas.

requirement: The system shall automatically write all sections and captions in the paper using the provided inputs.
exact_text_quote: Using these inputs, the AI agent automatically writes all sections and captions in the paper.

requirement: The system shall improve the quality of the generated paper by effectively utilizing the baseline resources across all phases.
exact_text_quote: By effectively utilizing these resources across all phases, the system significantly improves the quality of the generated paper.

requirement: The system shall ensure that the coding agent does not run commands that may cause side effects, such as python or other execution commands.
exact_text_quote: while commands that may cause side effects (e.g. python or other execution commands) are not allowed.

requirement: The system shall set the page layout to 8 pages.
exact_text_quote: We set the page layout to 8 pages.

requirement: The system shall perform iterative and gradual page-length reduction until the manuscript reaches the target length to improve the stability of page adjustment.
exact_text_quote: our method performs iterative and gradual page-length reduction until the manuscript reaches the target length, thereby improving the stability of page adjustment.

requirement: The system shall produce final papers that consistently fall within ±1 page of the specified page limit.
exact_text_quote: As a result, the final papers consistently fell within±1 page of the specified page limit.

requirement: The system shall require human authors to carefully inspect and validate all content prior to publication.
exact_text_quote: it is essential that all content be carefully inspected and validated by human authors prior to publication.

requirement: The system shall generate hypotheses, design experiments, and discover new knowledge as part of scientific inquiry.
exact_text_quote: evolving from a mere “auxiliary tool” to a “scientific research partner” capable of generating hypotheses, designing experiments, and even discovering new knowledge.

requirement: The system shall assist researchers in overcoming cognitive limitations to formulate more valuable research questions.
exact_text_quote: it assists researchers in overcoming cognitive limitations to formulate more valuable research questions;

requirement: The system shall optimize or autonomously construct research tools.
exact_text_quote: it optimizes, or even autonomously constructs, research tools;

requirement: The system shall enable researchers to examine subjects more comprehensively and uncover correlations that would otherwise be overlooked.
exact_text_quote: it enables researchers to examine subjects more comprehensively and may uncover correlations that would otherwise be overlooked

requirement: The system shall propose new compound formulations using AI algorithms and support a design-synthesis-testing closed loop with robotic preparation and testing.
exact_text_quote: It applies AI algorithms to independently propose new compound formulations, while robotic systems handle the preparation and testing of these materials, forming a complete “design-synthesis-testing” closed loop.

requirement: The system shall provide cloud-based research capabilities that cover all stages from theoretical prediction, experimental design, automated execution, to data analysis and iteration.
exact_text_quote: This system delivers efficient and collaborative cloud-based research capabilities, covering all stages from theoretical prediction, experimental design, and automated execution to data analysis and iteration,

requirement: The system shall automatically orchestrate scientific tools across domains based on knowledge graphs.
exact_text_quote: The SciToolAgent[[23](#B23)], developed by Zhejiang University (Hangzhou, China), is an LLM-powered agent that automatically orchestrates hundreds of scientific tools across chemistry, biology, and materials science based on knowledge graphs,

requirement: The system shall use a planner that applies Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over a knowledge base of scientific tools to create a tailored toolchain for a user query.
exact_text_quote: an LLM-based Planner uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) on this knowledge base to create a tailored toolchain.

requirement: The system shall execute the planned toolchain sequentially using an LLM-based executor.
exact_text_quote: This plan is then executed sequentially by an LLM-based Executor,

requirement: The system shall safeguard the integrity of scientific research by addressing vulnerabilities that threaten authenticity of AI-enabled scientific research.
exact_text_quote: Addressing these challenges is not merely a technical necessity, but also a safeguard for the integrity of scientific research.

requirement: The system shall prioritize high-quality experimental data because its impact hinges on such data.
exact_text_quote: AI is transforming scientific discovery, but its impact hinges on high-quality experimental data.

requirement: The system shall support uncertainty-aware decision-making as part of coupling AI with experimentation.
exact_text_quote: and (3) uncertainty-aware decision-making.

requirement: The system shall be treated as a tool for validating science rather than a replacement for it.
exact_text_quote: where AI is treated as a tool for validating science, not a replacement for it.

requirement: The system shall generate a self-contained Python program based on a natural language instruction, a dataset, and optional expert-provided knowledge.
exact_text_quote: Each task requires an agent to generate a self-contained Python program based on a natural language instruction, a dataset, and optional expert-provided knowledge.

requirement: The system shall edit a full codebase based on an issue description and produce a patch that must apply cleanly and pass fail-to-pass tests.
exact_text_quote: Each task requires the model to edit a full codebase based on an issue description, producing a patch that must apply cleanly and pass fail-to-pass tests.

requirement: The system shall enable AI agents to interact with software and execute actions in a sandboxed runtime.
exact_text_quote: OpenHands (Wang et al., [2024c](#bib.bib468 "OpenHands: an open platform for ai software developers as generalist agents")) enables AI agents to interact with software, execute actions in a sandboxed runtime, and collaborate across tasks using predefined benchmarks.

requirement: The system shall generate Python code from instructions and/or images to produce charts.
exact_text_quote: Shi et al. ([2024a](#bib.bib250 "ChartMimic: evaluating lmm’s cross-modal reasoning capability via chart-to-code generation")) aim to generate Python code from instructions and/or images, specifically focusing on charts.

requirement: The system shall mitigate hallucinations by grounding answers in the provided documents rather than relying solely on the model’s pre-trained knowledge.
exact_text_quote: This mechanism ensures that answers are directly grounded in the provided documents rather than relying solely on the model’s pre-trained knowledge, enhancing factual reliability and interpretability.

requirement: The system shall answer data questions posed by employees using an LLM-powered Slack bot.
exact_text_quote: In 2025, we shipped an LLM-powered Slack bot to break this tension.

requirement: The system shall provide answers to data questions in public forums until it has confidence to expand.
exact_text_quote: Directed users to ask questions in public forums until we had confidence to expand

requirement: The system shall limit the LLM agent to only data scientist-endorsed metrics codified through semantic views.
exact_text_quote: Limited the LLM agent to only data scientist-endorsed metrics, codified through [Snowflake semantic views](https://docs.snowflake.com/en/user-guide/views-semantic/overview)

requirement: The system shall generate a SQL query to answer a question by selecting from a set of semantic views mapped to trusted data assets.
exact_text_quote: This service then selected from a set of semantic views mapped to trusted data assets managed in [dbt](https://www.getdbt.com/lp/trusted-data-foundations?utm_medium=ppc&utm_source=adwords&utm_campaign=&utm_content=cloud-account_kw-dbt-ex___&utm_term=dbt+tool&cq_cmp=22042200402&hsa_acc=8253637521&hsa_cam=22042200402&hsa_grp=170308822737&hsa_ad=793035488624&hsa_src=g&hsa_tgt=kwd-929184813309&hsa_kw=dbt+tool&hsa_mt=e&hsa_net=adwords&hsa_ver=3&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=22042200402&gbraid=0AAAAABONxYj90uZr9b4WarwqNijyts-03&gclid=Cj0KCQiAp-zLBhDkARIsABcYc6s-2oYBKqNWAEJqGJix-G-hQA5Y46iv3BAgq4Ehyux5TDTxj065L0kaAus-EALw_wcB), generated a SQL query to answer the question, then ran and returned the result set to the user.

requirement: The system shall prioritize trustworthiness over flexibility by locking down access to pre-vetted datasets to avoid wrong data.
exact_text_quote: We went the opposite direction: locked down access to pre-vetted datasets, accepting that we’d miss around 30% of questions. No data is often better than wrong data, since inaccuracies erode trust faster than unknowns.

requirement: The system shall be fast enough that most answered questions are handled in tens of seconds.
exact_text_quote: Since launch, employees have had over ten thousand data questions answered by AI systems, with most answered in tens of seconds

requirement: The system shall shift from primarily supporting users to primarily supporting context definition by using a feedback loop where a data expert updates the agent’s access when an answer is not delivered.
exact_text_quote: In other words, it shifted support from primarily supporting users to primarily supporting context definition.

requirement: The system shall require explicit context engineering so that agents are fast and consistent when generating SQL.
exact_text_quote: They need explicit context to be fast and consistent.

requirement: The system shall index actual values for specific fields using search services so that context can be added to semantic views to accelerate and improve query results.
exact_text_quote: In our case, we set up Cortex search services to index the actual values for specific fields, which can be added to the semantic view to accelerate and improve the query results.

requirement: The system shall treat semantic views as production code by supporting version control, testing, monitoring, and clear ownership.
exact_text_quote: including version control, testing, monitoring, and clear ownership.

requirement: The system shall integrate semantic view management into an existing dbt lifecycle through custom materializations so that semantic views and search services can be created and versioned alongside underlying tables.
exact_text_quote: One improvement we made was to integrate semantic view management into our existing dbt lifecycle through custom materializations. This allowed semantic views and search services to be created and versioned alongside their underlying tables.

requirement: The system shall generate scientific theories according to a distribution that approximates the true Bayesian posterior over theories given data.
exact_text_quote: We will call **AI Scientist** the neural network that generates theories according to a distribution that approximates the true Bayesian posterior over theories, P(theory | data).

requirement: The system shall answer questions probabilistically by approximating the Bayesian posterior predictive given a question and data.
exact_text_quote: The AI Agent estimates the Bayesian posterior predictive, P(answer | question, data).

requirement: The system shall provide a safest mode in which the AI Scientist has no goal and does not plan.
exact_text_quote: The safest kind of AI is the AI Scientist. It has no goal and it does not plan.

requirement: The system shall support the generation of human-understandable scientific outputs by expressing theories in a human-understandable language.
exact_text_quote: The theories it generates could be broken down into digestible pieces comparable to scientific papers, and we may be able to constrain it to express its theories in a human-understandable language (which includes natural language, scientific jargon, mathematics and programming languages).

requirement: The system shall enable probabilistic inference by averaging probabilistic answers to questions across theories weighted by their posterior probabilities.
exact_text_quote: Bayesian calculations also mandates how (in principle) to answer any question in a probabilistic way (called the Bayesian posterior predictive) by averaging the probabilistic answer to any question from all these theories, each weighted by the theory’s posterior probability.

requirement: The system shall provide quantitative safety guarantees by rejecting actions whose probability of major harm exceeds a tiny but human-chosen threshold.
exact_text_quote: we could use it to reject actions that could potentially be harmful according to the posterior, e.g., if the probability of major harm is above a tiny but human-chosen threshold.

requirement: The system shall exhibit epistemic humility by knowing the limits of its own knowledge and avoiding actions that could yield major harm when in doubt.
exact_text_quote: What is needed for taking safe decisions is epistemic humility: the AI must know the limits of its own knowledge, so that in case of doubt it avoids actions that could yield major harm according to some of the theories from the Bayesian posterior over theories.

requirement: The system shall implement safeguards now to prevent potential risks and harms from the development and deployment of AI systems with subjective experience.
exact_text_quote: a strong majority of AI researchers (68%) and the public (85%) agree that AI developers should begin implementing safeguards now to prevent potential risks and harms.

requirement: The system shall ensure that, if an AI system with subjective experience is created, it treats others well, behaves ethically, and is held accountable.
exact_text_quote: if created, AI systems with subjective experience should treat others well, behave ethically, and be held accountable.

requirement: The system shall support the assessment of AI subjective experience using input from multiple fields.
exact_text_quote: Both AI researchers and the public believe that evaluating AI subjective experience requires input from multiple fields.

requirement: The system shall support determining whether an AI system has subjective experience by using expertise from technical AI researchers, neuroscientists and psychologists, and AI ethics researchers.
exact_text_quote: The most highly valued sources of expertise were technical AI researchers, neuroscientists and psychologists, and AI ethics researchers

requirement: The system shall hold AI systems accountable for their actions.
exact_text_quote: The majority of AI researchers and the public think that an AI system with subjective experience should be held accountable for its actions

requirement: The system shall ensure that AI systems with subjective experience treat others well.
exact_text_quote: treat others well

requirement: The system shall ensure that AI systems with subjective experience behave with integrity, honesty, and fairness.
exact_text_quote: behave with integrity, honesty, and fairness

requirement: The system shall function as a collaborative tool for scientists.
exact_text_quote: The AI co-scientist is a multi-agent AI system that is intended to function as a collaborative tool for scientists.

requirement: The system shall generate novel research hypotheses, a detailed research overview, and experimental protocols given a scientist’s research goal specified in natural language.
exact_text_quote: Given a scientist’s research goal that has been specified in natural language, the AI co-scientist is designed to generate novel research hypotheses, a detailed research overview, and experimental protocols.

requirement: The system shall use a coalition of specialized agents to iteratively generate, evaluate, and refine hypotheses using automated feedback.
exact_text_quote: These agents use automated feedback to iteratively generate, evaluate, and refine hypotheses, resulting in a self-improving cycle of increasingly high-quality and novel outputs.

requirement: The system shall allow scientists to interact with it by directly providing their own seed ideas for exploration or by providing feedback on generated outputs in natural language.
exact_text_quote: scientists can interact with the system in many ways, including by directly providing their own seed ideas for exploration or by providing feedback on generated outputs in natural language.

requirement: The system shall use tools, like web-search and specialized AI models, to enhance the grounding and quality of generated hypotheses.
exact_text_quote: The AI co-scientist also uses tools, like web-search and specialized AI models, to enhance the grounding and quality of generated hypotheses.

requirement: The system shall parse the assigned goal into a research plan configuration managed by a Supervisor agent.
exact_text_quote: The AI co-scientist parses the assigned goal into a research plan configuration, managed by a Supervisor agent.

requirement: The system shall assign specialized agents to a worker queue and allocate resources.
exact_text_quote: The Supervisor agent assigns the specialized agents to the worker queue and allocates resources.

requirement: The system shall flexibly scale compute.
exact_text_quote: This design enables the system to flexibly scale compute and to iteratively improve its scientific reasoning towards the specified research goal.

requirement: The system shall leverage test-time compute scaling to iteratively reason, evolve, and improve outputs.
exact_text_quote: The AI co-scientist leverages test-time compute scaling to iteratively reason, evolve, and improve outputs.

requirement: The system shall perform recursive self-critique, including tool use for feedback to refine hypotheses and proposals.
exact_text_quote: The system's agentic nature facilitates recursive self-critique, including tool use for feedback to refine hypotheses and proposals.

requirement: The system shall generate novel, testable hypotheses across diverse scientific and biomedical domains.
exact_text_quote: Its ability to generate novel, testable hypotheses across diverse scientific and biomedical domains — some already validated experimentally — and its capacity for recursive self-improvement with increased compute, demonstrate its potential to accelerate scientists' efforts to address grand challenges in science and medicine.

requirement: The system shall build an evaluation pipeline for an LLM-based application by examining, understanding, and analyzing the data.
exact_text_quote: To build an evaluation pipeline, you still need to invest a substantial amount of effort in examining, understanding, and analyzing your data.

requirement: The system shall support gathering evaluation data from a production environment or by using the application to obtain examples of failures.
exact_text_quote: It all starts with data – ideally, real data from your production environment. If you don’t have it yet, you can try using your application yourself or ask friends to use it to get a sense of how it can fail.

requirement: The system shall support generating synthetic data to start or complement existing data when volume is low.
exact_text_quote: In some cases, it’s possible to generate synthetic data to get things started, or to complement existing data, if your volume is low.

requirement: When using synthetic data, the system shall ensure it is of high quality and closely matches the expectations of real-world data.
exact_text_quote: When using synthetic data, ensure it is of high quality and closely matches the expectations of real-world data.

requirement: The system shall support active data annotation by allowing users to note insights as they go.
exact_text_quote: This process should be active, so make sure to note your insights as you go.

requirement: The system shall support error analysis by reviewing existing outputs to identify failures and recording free-text notes or error categories for inadequate responses.
exact_text_quote: For example, you could add free-text notes explaining the failures or tag inadequate responses with different error categories.

requirement: The system shall support defining success artifacts such as ground-truth reference answers or rubrics with guidelines for what an ideal answer should include.
exact_text_quote: For example, for each output, you could write ground-truth reference answers or develop a rubric with guidelines that specify what an ideal answer should include.

requirement: The system shall support creating rubrics to reduce subjectivity by ensuring an ideal response ticks all boxes in the rubric regardless of phrasing.
exact_text_quote: This allows for reducing the subjectivity of the evaluation process – no matter how the response is phrased, it should tick all the boxes in the rubric.

requirement: The system shall support flexible rubric criteria that can be used by either a human or an LLM judge.
exact_text_quote: The rubrics can be flexible because they are intended to be used by either a human or an LLM judge, and both can deal with this subjectivity.

requirement: The system shall support building a repeatable evaluation process using a versioned evaluation dataset.
exact_text_quote: With annotated data in hand, you can build a repeatable evaluation process.

requirement: The system shall generate dialogues imbued with agency and its features for a given LLM.

requirement: The system shall allow agents to read or update blackboard content so that collaboration flows are formed based on shared views.

requirement: The system shall use machine learning tools to incorporate scientific knowledge, biological principles, and theories.
